question: When did John and his gaming friends organize the charity tournament?
docs:
DATE: 12:40 am on 27 March, 2022
John said, "Nice work! Looks like you're doing great. Anything new in general that you'd recommend?"

Tried out loads of games, met developers, and even took part in a tournament - unreal! Check out this pic I took!" and shared a photography of a crowded convention hall with a large crowd of people.

James said, "Hey John! Awesome job organizing a gaming tournament for a children's hospital! Combining gaming and a good cause - that's really cool! Tell me more about who helped out and what other games were played."
John said, "Thanks! We all pulled together for a great cause. My gaming pals and I also played Overwatch and Apex Legends. Everyone had a blast raising money for the kids' hospital. The atmosphere was awesome and everyone was so competitive. In the end, we raised a good amount. Feels good to use our love of gaming for good!"
